title: 文物修复师 Relic Restorer
description:
History is not lost—it waits to be restored.

Step into the role of a relic restorer and breathe new life into treasures from ancient civilizations. Carefully assemble scattered fragments, reveal the complete form of forgotten artifacts, and uncover the stories they carry through time.

Each restored piece enriches your museum collection, allowing visitors to rediscover the beauty, craftsmanship, and legacy of the past. From delicate jade ornaments and elegant ceramics to mysterious bronzes and ancient paintings, every artifact offers a new puzzle to solve and a new chapter of history to revisit.

Take your time, enjoy the soothing atmosphere, and experience the quiet satisfaction of preserving what history left behind.

Features:

• Relaxing yet engaging fragment-based puzzle gameplay
• Restore a wide variety of artifacts inspired by ancient civilizations
• Explore themed museums and expand your collection
• Hand-painted storybook visuals with a cozy atmosphere
• Learn the stories behind each relic as history gradually unfolds
• Designed for players who enjoy thoughtful, stress-free experiences
description_short: In this 2D puzzle game, you play as a cultural relic restorer tasked with mending broken cultural relics.
